full_text:
Zheng Ta 鄭他
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Ta (鄭他). Surrendered to Sima Yi after failing to save Meng Da. Zheng Ta was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
